headline: Walmart, Target, and Costco make key self-checkout changes
summary: Checking out from a grocery store used to be a relatively simple thing. You waited in line, then a person scanned your items, you paid — maybe even by writing a check — and then went on your way. Some stores had 10-items-or-less lines, and the closest thing to a checkout controversy would be when ...

headline: Prediction: Costco Will Trade At This Price In 1 Year
summary: Costco (NASDAQ:COST) has rebounded from its December lows to retake the $995 handle, and our proprietary model sees more room to run. With membership fee income compounding double digits and digital comp sales surging above 20%, the warehouse giant continues to defy retail gravity. Here is where I think the stock heads next.
